emails.subject: Wanted to say hi
emails.snippet: Just wanted to say thanks again for listening to me vent. You're the best. Let's do something fun soon!

emails.subject: I have news
emails.snippet: Hi! I haven't heard from you in a while. How are you doing? Would love to grab coffee or dinner soon. Let me know when you're free!

emails.subject: You won't believe this
emails.snippet: I have something I want to tell you. Not anything bad, just exciting! Call me when you get a chance.
